problem id: 46ae00b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  11101011 -> 01100101
  10110110 -> 11000100
  01001111 -> 11100000
  01000110 -> 11000000
  10000111 -> 11100000
  10111011 -> 01100101
  01111111 -> 11100011

query: 01110111
predicted answer: 11100010
